text: A street scene in an urban area. A white pickup truck with a large, light-colored cargo box is parked on the left side of the road. The truck has 'RML' and 'R.B.' written on the side. In the background, there is a multi-story building with exposed brickwork on the upper floor. Below the building, a yellow structure is visible, featuring a colorful, dense display of posters and advertisements. A blue metal fence runs along the sidewalk in front of the yellow structure. Several trees line the street, and a white car is partially visible on the far right.
